headline: Is Intuitive Surgical, Inc. (ISRG) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is ISRG a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Intuitive Surgical, Inc. on Rijnberk InvestInsights’s Substack by Daan | InvestInsights. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on ISRG. Intuitive Surgical, Inc.’s share was trading at $451.29 as of April 21st. ISRG’s trailing and forward P/E were 59.16 and 46.51 […]

headline: Jim Cramer Believes Competitors Might Hurt Intuitive Surgical
summary: Intuitive Surgical, Inc. (NASDAQ:ISRG) was among the stocks Jim Cramer highlighted, as he discussed the massive AI infrastructure buildout. A caller asked for Cramer’s thoughts on the company, and he said: Here’s the thing: Both J&J and Medtronic claim they’ve got competitors. And I am worried that one of those two is going to hit […]
